_comment: All rankings are approximate project rankings based on known CS/SE reputation in Pakistan and publicly available ranking sources. Verify before final submission.
ranking_basis: Widely regarded as the top CS/SE university in Pakistan. Strong industry reputation and graduate outcomes.
ranking_source_note: Approximate project ranking based on general reputation among Pakistani CS students and employers.

ranking_basis: Top-ranked engineering university nationally. SEECS school highly competitive for CS/SE.
